text:
Glockenspiel Summer is a major character in the episode Mortyplicity, and is one of the many Summer Smith decoys. She is the only Glockenspiel decoy family member that wanted to hurt other decoys. She, along with many other decoys, were betrayed by Glockenspiel Jerry, leading to her and many other decoys being killed by the squids.

After scarecrow variants of the Smith family kidnap another decoy Smith family, Glockenspiel Summer and her version of the Smith family intervenes, saving the other Smith family from the scarecrow versions. They do not care for killing other decoys, instead saving as many as they can. They take their counterparts into a canyon, where a community of various decoys hides underground. As Glockenspiel Beth creates peace with the community of decoys, the squids attack them, causing Glockenspiel Jerry to lock himself in the escape route with a can of varnish, effectively leaving Glockenspiel Summer and the rest of the decoys to die.
